channel.title: byte-space on ekansh goenka
channel.description: Recent content in byte-space on ekansh goenka

item.title: Protocol Implementations
item.description: Notes on implementing HTTP, SMTP, DNS, and Telnet from scratch in Go.

item.title: ByteShell Design
item.description: Design notes on ByteShell — the terminal emulator inside byte-space.

item.title: The IPC System
item.description: How byte-space handles inter-process communication via Unix sockets.
